CustomField.description: CPU Time usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsCpuTimeMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c / LimitsCpuTimeMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.CpuTime.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c / LimitsCpuTimeMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.CpuTime.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c / LimitsCpuTimeMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsCpuTimeConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsCpuTimeMax__c) & " ms)" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: CPU Time usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: CPU Time
